about.question: What is MPC?
about.answer: MPC (Mauritania Programmers Community) is a community of 880+ developers from Mauritania. Founded on September 21, 2024, we bring together programmers of all skill levels to learn, share knowledge, and collaborate on projects.

join.question: How can I join the community?
join.answer: Joining MPC is free and easy! Simply click the 'Join WhatsApp Group' button on our website to become part of our active community. We welcome developers of all experience levels.

topics.question: What topics does MPC cover?
topics.answer: We cover a wide range of programming topics including Web Development (React, Next.js, Vue), Cybersecurity and Ethical Hacking, Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning, Mobile Development, and much more.

events.question: Are MPC events free?
events.answer: Yes! All MPC events, workshops, and sessions are completely free. We believe in making tech education accessible to everyone in Mauritania.

who.question: Who can participate in MPC?
who.answer: Anyone interested in programming and technology can join MPC! Whether you're a beginner just starting your coding journey or an experienced developer, you're welcome here. We especially encourage Mauritanian developers to join.

cta.title: Ready to Level Up Your Skills?
cta.description: Join our community of passionate developers and start your journey today.
